title: PBMC Isolation from Buffy Coat
author: Bulent Arman Aksoy
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qu2dwye

steps.title: Fill 4x 50-ml falcons with 15 ml isolation buffer
steps.instruction: Fill 4x 50-ml falcons with 15 ml isolation buffer.

steps.title: Cut the buffy coat and fill...
steps.instruction: Cut the buffy coat and fill another 50 ml falcon tube.

steps.title: Split the 50 ml blood between...
steps.instruction: Split the 50 ml blood between 4X 50-ml falcons that have the isolation buffer.

steps.title: All tubes should have ~30 ml...
steps.instruction: All tubes should have ~30 ml blood/buffer mix at this point.

steps.title: Using a 10 ml pipet, gently...
steps.instruction: Using a 10 ml pipet, gently underlay 14 ml of Corning™ cellgro™ Lymphocyte Separation Medium below the blood.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 800 X g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 800 X g for 25 min at RT with soft deceleration.

steps.title: In the meantime, get 4 new 50 ml falcons
steps.instruction: In the meantime, get 4 new 50 ml falcons.

steps.title: After the centrifuge, use a 10...
steps.instruction: After the centrifuge, use a 10 ml pipet to transfer the cloudy buffy layer to a fresh tube.

steps.title: Wait for 1-2 mins for more...
steps.instruction: Wait for 1-2 mins for more of the buffy layer to form and transfer that to the fresh tube as well. 00:02:00

steps.title: Add cold isolation buffer to each...
steps.instruction: Add cold isolation buffer to each tube so that the final volume is now 40 ml.

steps.title: Mix by gently inverting tubes for...
steps.instruction: Mix by gently inverting tubes for a few times and centrifuge at 500 X g for 10 min at 4°C.

steps.title: Discard the supernatant (leave ~5ml liquid)...
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant (leave ~5ml liquid) into a bleach filled container.

steps.title: Combine the pellet from all tubes...
steps.instruction: Combine the pellet from all tubes into one tube and increase the volume to 40 ml by adding isolation buffer.

steps.title: Take 10 ul from the sample...
steps.instruction: Take 10 ul from the sample and mix with 90 ul of PBS (1:10)

steps.title: Mix with 10 ul of Trypan...
steps.instruction: Mix with 10 ul of Trypan Blue with 10 ul of the sample and load 10 ul to the cell counter chamber for counting. (Thermo Fisher Scientific, AMQAX1000, Countess™ II Automated Cell Counter)

steps.title: Continue with the desired T cell...
steps.instruction: Continue with the desired T cell isolation kit or freeze PBMC cells.

steps.title: Mix them all and sterile filter...
steps.instruction: Mix them all and sterile filter the buffer (EMD Millipore™ Stericup™ Sterile Vacuum Filter Units, 0.22 um). Keep it in the fridge.
